description_long: This is a compact wooden desk with a warm, reddish-brown finish, featuring a main work surface and an elevated shelf running the full width at the back. On the right side beneath the shelf, there are two open cubby compartments for organizing small items or documents. Below the main surface, a single cabinet door is present on the right, likely providing enclosed storage space. The left side of the desk is supported by a solid, curved panel, while the right side is partially enclosed by the cabinet structure. The overall design is functional and space-efficient, suitable for use in offices, study areas, or as a workstation in urban environments.
description: A reddish-brown wooden desk with an upper shelf, two open cubbies, and a single lower cabinet door, designed for compact storage and workspace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface, upper shelf, two open cubbies, and the cabinet door on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved support panel and the layered structure of the desk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the cabinet door's position on the right.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cabinet door and the side profile of the upper shelf and cubbies.
